method: 32 UK queries x (Serper gl=gb + DDG uk-en) -> 180 domains -> estate/directory filter (hard assert, 1 estate leak dropped: hollowaydavies.co.uk) -> 167 candidates -> fetch-verify homepage + one charity service page each (raw/verify_evidence.json); WAF-blocked domains re-verified via WebFetch where material

true_rivals.evidence: H1 'Expert Accountants for Small Charities Across the UK'; services: annual accounts, independent examination, payroll, Gift Aid, Commission compliance
true_rivals.notes: Closest model to our play: exact-match brand, small-charity target, national remote

true_rivals.evidence: Meta: 'accounting, bookkeeping and independent examination services at reasonable price to charities and social enterprises'; ACCA firm
H1 'Help with Filing CIC & Charity Accounts?'; 'Specialists in Community interest Companies(CICS) & Charities'
true_rivals.notes: Blog domain kgaccountantsblog.com (11 SERP hits) is their ranking machine

true_rivals.evidence: Title 'KG Accountants Blog — Specialists in Community interest Companies(CICS) & Charities'
true_rivals.notes: Content arm of kgaccountants.co.uk; ranks for CIC setup/registration clusters (ranked_keywords: cic 12100, community interest company 6600)

true_rivals.evidence: WebFetch 2026-07-11: 'Specialist Charity Accountants Who Give Your Team Real Time Back'; SORP-ready accounts; named ACA founder, ICAEW, London address
true_rivals.notes: Targets GBP100k-GBP250k+ up to NGOs; real firm

true_rivals.evidence: H1 'Complete Accountancy Services for Community Interest Companies'; fixed monthly packages
true_rivals.notes: Owns the CIC head term lane

true_rivals.evidence: Meta: 'Independent Examiners Ltd — UK charity specialists since 1996. Independent examination and year-end charity accounts... Fixed fees'
true_rivals.notes: Owns the IE money lane; 28 years incumbency

true_rivals.evidence: Meta: 'Expert Charity Independent Examination for UK charities under GBP100k income. Fixed-fee, remote-friendly'
true_rivals.notes: Direct competitor for the small-charity IE funnel

true_rivals.evidence: 'Chartered Accountants for small charities & social enterprises' (London)
Title 'Accountants for Charities — Charity Accountants for Charities Non Profit Accounting Support'; 138 charity mentions; location doorway pages (e.g. 'Shipley BD18 3')
true_rivals.notes: Exact-match with programmatic location pages — a rank-and-rent-style SEO play; watch its footprint

true_rivals.evidence: Serper #1 for 'charity accountant': 'leading UK-based accountants dedicated to the non-profit sector... grant management to tax' (SERP snippet; homepage 403 to both bot fetch and WebFetch)
true_rivals.notes: OPEN: manual browser verification pending; treat as rival on SERP evidence
